steps.title: Complete the purpose phrase
steps.content: The sentence says Ochoa left her NASA position for a reason: entering the astronaut training program. Standard English expresses purpose after “left her position” with an infinitive.

steps.title: Use the infinitive form
steps.content: Choice B uses present progressive tense, Choice C creates a second past-tense verb without a proper connection, and Choice D uses present tense. The construction needs to plus the base verb after “left her position.” The answer is A.
